heading: General provisions relating to bonds
label: 5355 General provisions relating to bonds
text: The provisions of section 5551 (relating to bonds) shall be applicable to the bonds required under section 5354.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5355, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 664Pub. L. 85–859
